description.tr: El yapımı tam deri, günlük kullanım için şık ve dayanıklı klasik çanta. İç bölmeleri ile düzenli kullanım.
description.en: Handcrafted full leather, elegant and durable classic bag for daily use. Organized with inner compartments.
description.de: Handgefertigte Vollledertasche, elegant und langlebig. Mit Innenfächern.
description.fr: Sac classique en cuir véritable, élégant et durable. Compartiments intérieurs.
description.pt: Bolsa clássica de couro legítimo, elegante e durável. Com divisórias internas.
description.es: Bolso clásico de cuero genuino, elegante y duradero. Con compartimentos interiores.

description.tr: %100 organik pamuk, rahat kesim. Günlük giyim için ideal, yumuşak dokulu oversize tişört.
description.en: 100% organic cotton, relaxed fit. Ideal for daily wear, soft oversize t-shirt.
description.de: 100% Bio-Baumwolle, lockere Passform. Ideal für den Alltag.
description.fr: 100% coton bio, coupe décontractée. Idéal au quotidien.
description.pt: 100% algodão orgânico, caimento confortável. Ideal para o dia a dia.
description.es: 100% algodón orgánico, corte relajado. Ideal para el día a día.

description.tr: Hafif taban ve nefes alan üst yüzey. Koşu ve günlük kullanım için konforlu spor ayakkabı.
description.en: Lightweight sole and breathable upper. Comfortable for running and daily use.
description.de: Leichte Sohle und atmungsaktives Obermaterial. Bequem für Sport und Alltag.
description.fr: Semelle légère et empeigne respirante. Confortable pour le sport et le quotidien.
description.pt: Solado leve e cabedal respirável. Confortável para corrida e uso diário.
description.es: Suela ligera y parte superior transpirable. Cómodo para correr y uso diario.

description.tr: Paslanmaz çelik kasa, mineral cam. Şık ve sade tasarım, her kombinle uyumlu.
description.en: Stainless steel case, mineral crystal. Elegant minimalist design, matches every outfit.
description.de: Gehäuse aus Edelstahl, Mineralglas. Elegantes minimalistisches Design.
description.fr: Boîtier en acier inoxydable, verre minéral. Design élégant et minimaliste.
description.pt: Caixa em aço inox, cristal mineral. Design minimalista e elegante.
description.es: Caja de acero inoxidable, cristal mineral. Diseño elegante y minimalista.

description.tr: Kaliteli denim kumaş, slim fit kesim. İlk yıkamada hafif çekme yapabilir.
description.en: Quality denim fabric, slim fit cut. May shrink slightly on first wash.
description.de: Hochwertiger Denim, Slim-Fit-Schnitt. Kann beim ersten Waschen leicht einlaufen.
description.fr: Jean de qualité, coupe slim fit. Peut rétrécir légèrement au premier lavage.
description.pt: Tecido jeans de qualidade, corte slim. Pode encolher levemente na primeira lavagem.
description.es: Tela vaquera de calidad, corte slim. Puede encogerse ligeramente en el primer lavado.
